creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

New Revision: 323000
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/323000

Log:

Modified:

Modified: head/lang/opendylan/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/opendylan/Makefile	Sun Jul 14 19:56:12 2013	(r322999)
+++ head/lang/opendylan/Makefile	Sun Jul 14 20:11:46 2013	(r323000)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	opendylan
-DISTVERSION=	2012.1
+DISTVERSION=	2013.1
 CATEGORIES=	lang
 MASTER_SITES=	http://opendylan.org/downloads/opendylan/${DISTVERSION}/
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-${DISTVERSION}-x86-freebsd
